title: Parks Omnibus — Breanna Stewart Kirk Park Donation, Landscape Contracts, and Community Programs
summary: Commissioner Aisha Bird presents multiple parks items. Item 17: $50K Breanna Stewart Foundation donation for Kirk Park basketball court upgrades (lighting, rims, backboards); Stewart may visit Syracuse. Items 18-23: six landscape architectural service agreements at $300K each (5 of 6 local, two-year contracts, project-based). Item 24: Cornell Cooperative Extension 4H summer camp. Item 25: $20K ash tree treatment (148 trees). Item 26: Barks and Rex contract extension ($21K increase). Commissioner highlights upcoming improvements: Homarus concession/splash pad, playground investments, Thornden Park stage. Caldwell requests tick/deer awareness signage in parks. Resolution honoring Carmelita Sap Walker for Common Council service; all councilors join.
